mapper.select: SELECT a.*, c.name as category_name, c.slug as category_slug, u.nickname as author_name FROM article a LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.author_id = u.id WHERE a.id = #{id} AND a.deleted = 0

SELECT a.*, c.name as category_name, c.slug as category_slug, u.nickname as author_name FROM article a LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.author_id = u.id WHERE a.slug = #{slug} AND a.deleted = 0
SELECT a.*, c.name as category_name FROM article a LEFT JOIN category c ON a.category_id = c.id WHERE a.deleted = 0 AND a.status = 1 ORDER BY a.view_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM article WHERE deleted = 0
AND status = #{status}
SELECT id, title, slug, create_time FROM article WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO article (title, slug, summary, content, cover_image, category_id, is_top, status, seo_keywords, seo_description, author_id, publish_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{slug}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{coverImage}, #{categoryId}, #{isTop}, #{status}, #{seoKeywords}, #{seoDescription}, #{authorId}, #{publishTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE article SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE article SET view_count = view_count + #{count} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE article SET like_count = like_count + #{count} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE article SET comment_count = comment_count + #{count} WHERE id = #{id}
